title: Using status changes to trigger Zapier action

posts.author: caitlingold (Caitlin Gold)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is is possible to have an item with a specific status that, when changed to another specific status, triggers adding specific tag to that user’s ID in Keap using Zapier?

Ex. Item has status “in progress”. That status gets changed to “Booked” → gets tagged in Keap with “Booked” tag?

When I was on Zapier, I only saw the option to add a tag when an item’s status was changed, but it didn’t allow the option to specify which status to another specific status
